generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that maintaining strong alliances actually strengthens our civil liberties at home? By sharing the burden of defense, we free up resources for domestic priorities like healthcare and education. Our allies in Europe and Asia are stepping up, and it's time we recognize how this benefits all of us. #StrongAlliancesStrongNation #NationalSecurityMatters
